headline: This Restaurant Payments Stock Is Up 15% In A Month: Here’s Why Goldman Sachs Sees Further Upside
summary: According to a CNBC report, the investment bank upgraded Toast Inc. to ‘Buy’ from ‘Neutral,’ raising its 12-month price target to $36 from $30.

content.summary: According to a CNBC report, the investment bank upgraded Toast Inc. to ‘Buy’ from ‘Neutral,’ raising its 12-month price target to $36 from $30.
